## Inspection Name
<!-- e.g., AspectNotBean, PointcutSyntax -->

## Issue Type
- [ ] False Positive (warning shown when it shouldn't be)
- [ ] False Negative (no warning shown when there should be)

## Code Sample
<!-- Provide the code that triggers the false positive/negative -->

```java
// Your code here
```

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What should the inspection do? -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What does the inspection currently do? -->

## Environment
- **Plugin Version:** (e.g., 1.0.0-beta.1)
- **IntelliJ IDEA Version:** (e.g., 2024.3)

## Additional Context
